source: Phase 1 — sourced from maps-reviews.json (GMB data) and serp-rankings.json (organic rankers)

candidates.name: Allstate Roofing Contractors (Phoenix AZ)
candidates.notes: High review volume, active GMB, BBB A+ mentioned, women-owned. Strong Sun Belt presence.

candidates.name: Stonecreek Roofing (Phoenix AZ)
candidates.notes: Mentioned in customer voice verbatim quotes. Phoenix Sun Belt market.

candidates.name: Colony Roofers (Atlanta GA)
candidates.notes: Named in multiple verbatim customer reviews. Named salesperson (Lucio) praised for process explanation. Strong trust-building example.

candidates.name: Perth Roof Replacements (student manual pick)
candidates.notes: Student manual pick. Vercel-hosted roofing site. Capture for design and layout reference.

candidates.name: Phoenix Roofing & Repair
candidates.notes: 1,018 reviews at 4.9 stars. Highest review count in dataset. Market leader signal.

candidates.name: Priority Roofs (Dallas TX)
candidates.notes: Dallas Sun Belt market. Has city-specific landing pages (signals good SEO structure).

candidates.name: Lyons Roofing (Phoenix AZ)
candidates.notes: UTM parameters on GMB link suggest active digital marketing. Phoenix market.

candidates.name: Champion Roofing
candidates.notes: Ranks organically for 'emergency roof repair'. Good emergency/service page structure to study.

candidates.name: JP Carroll Roofing
candidates.notes: Ranks organically for emergency repair. Clean service page URL structure.
